name: Live From the Back Pasture at Red Ants Pants Music Festival
original_name: Live From the Back Pasture at Red Ants Pants Music Festival
overview: Intimate, acoustic sets with well-known musical acts who perform at the Red Ants Pants Music Festival in White Sulphur Springs, MT.
